title: Fringe Academy How To Crowdfund
description: The arts and creative industries have been hit hard by years of cutbacks, but Crowdfunder is here to help. Crowdfunder has supported thousands of creative projects, giving them a platform to raise vital funding and create awareness when they need it most. This workshop with Zoe Rees-Oliver from Crowdfunder will outline the basic steps from start to finish, of how to crowdfund your idea and raise the funds you need. Join us to learn how any creative idea can become a reality, looking at the do’s, don’ts and the absolute musts. Please copy and paste this link into your browser to join the event: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/7800653204?omn=85920504769
